title: Iraq Summons U.S. Diplomat After Attack on Military Base
summary_full: The attack came a day after a separate strike on the same base, which hosts units viewed by the United States as allies of Iran.
summary_public: The attack came a day after a separate strike on the same base, which hosts units viewed by the United States as allies of Iran.
